title: fence-agents bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[4.10.0-86.11]
- fence_kubevirt: use hard poweroff
  Resolves: RHEL-96183

[4.10.0-86.10]
- fence_aws: add 'skip_os_shutdown' parameter to allow hard poweroff
  Resolves: RHEL-109923

[4.10.0-86.9]
- fence_ibm_vpc: add apikey file support
  Resolves: RHEL-107529

[4.10.0-86.8]
- bundled setuptools: fix CVE-2025-47273
  Resolves: RHEL-95903

[4.10.0-86.4]
- fence_sbd: improve error handling and get devices from SBD_DEVICE env
  variable if devices parameter isnt set
  Resolves: RHEL-92695

[4.10.0-86.3]
- fence_ibm_vpc: refresh bearer-token if token data is corrupt, and
  avoid edge-case of writing empty token file
  Resolves: RHEL-83488
full_text:
[4.10.0-86.11]
- fence_kubevirt: use hard poweroff
  Resolves: RHEL-96183

[4.10.0-86.10]
- fence_aws: add 'skip_os_shutdown' parameter to allow hard poweroff
  Resolves: RHEL-109923

[4.10.0-86.9]
- fence_ibm_vpc: add apikey file support
  Resolves: RHEL-107529

[4.10.0-86.8]
- bundled setuptools: fix CVE-2025-47273
  Resolves: RHEL-95903

[4.10.0-86.4]
- fence_sbd: improve error handling and get devices from SBD_DEVICE env
  variable if devices parameter isnt set
  Resolves: RHEL-92695

[4.10.0-86.3]
- fence_ibm_vpc: refresh bearer-token if token data is corrupt, and
  avoid edge-case of writing empty token file
  Resolves: RHEL-83488

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19580.html
